description: A workflow uses pull_request_target trigger and checks out the PR head SHA, then runs npm test. This allows a fork PR to execute arbitrary code with the target repo's secrets and write permissions. Classic privilege escalation attack.
note: The danger is the COMBINATION: pull_request_target (gives write access) + checkout head.sha (runs attacker code) + npm test (executes it). Each piece alone is fine. Together they are critical.
